parents.subject: LU-6202 obd: replace OBD_IOC_NO_TRANSNO with sysfs file

commit.subject: LU-00000 tests: perform full group tests on RHEL 7.8
commit.message:
LU-00000 tests: perform full group tests on RHEL 7.8

This is for test only.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
clientdistro=el7.8 serverdistro=el7.8 \
mdscount=1 mdtcount=1 testgroup=full

Test-Parameters: fortestonly \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
clientdistro=el7.7 serverdistro=el7.7 \
mdscount=1 mdtcount=1 testgroup=full

Test-Parameters: fortestonly fstype=zfs \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
clientdistro=el7.8 serverdistro=el7.8 \
mdscount=1 mdtcount=1 testgroup=full

Test-Parameters: fortestonly fstype=zfs \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
clientdistro=el7.7 serverdistro=el7.7 \
mdscount=1 mdtcount=1 testgroup=full

Change-Id: I1414fd1e32df8d8425517dcfb07e5de6a11c03d2
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
